positioning: Static interview demo showing how AI PM Radar can be adapted into an internal campaign operations and creative review workspace without adding backend complexity.
campaign_name: July lead-generation pilot for service-business webinar offers
demo_boundaries: Portfolio demo only, not a production SaaS platform.
Uses anonymised sample data stored in local JSON.
No backend, no login, no live client data, and no auto-publishing.

creative_analysis.hook_text: Why are leads watching but not booking?
creative_analysis.caption: Three fixes service businesses can test this week before paying for more traffic.
creative_analysis.visual_description: Presenter talking to camera with a clean metric overlay and webinar promise banner.
creative_analysis.first_3_seconds_description: Fast cut from ad spend screenshot to close-up question headline.
creative_analysis.performance_summary: High click-through rate, but weak group-join conversion after the first landing step.
creative_analysis.possible_issue: The promise is clear, but the transition from click to join may feel too operational and not outcome-led.
creative_analysis.ai_suggestion: Test a second variant that shows a real customer scenario before the admin checklist.
creative_analysis.next_action: Draft a more benefit-first opening and compare join rate over the next 3 days.

creative_analysis.hook_text: Can one checklist improve message reply consistency?
creative_analysis.caption: A simple AI-assisted reply framework for salons, coaches, and course businesses.
creative_analysis.visual_description: Three-panel carousel with inbox screenshots, checklist cards, and CTA card.
creative_analysis.first_3_seconds_description: First card shows unread messages and response delay pain point.
creative_analysis.performance_summary: Lower clicks than video, but stronger message quality once prospects reach the admin team.
creative_analysis.possible_issue: The CTA card may be too text-heavy on mobile and could reduce swipe completion.
creative_analysis.ai_suggestion: Shorten CTA copy and add a clearer before-versus-after proof frame.
creative_analysis.next_action: Create a lighter final panel and review completion rate in the next carousel batch.

weekly_report_draft: Traffic quality is acceptable, but the main drop-off still happens between click and group join.
Reply discipline is relatively strong once prospects message the team, suggesting admin workflow support is more urgent than more traffic volume.
Next weekly experiment should compare outcome-led creative framing against process-led framing.
ad_copy_ideas: Your leads are clicking. The problem starts after the click. Here is the admin workflow fix.
One AI-assisted reply checklist for coaches, salons, and instructors who need faster follow-up without messy automation.
Before buying more traffic, fix the join-to-message handoff.
ppt_outline: Funnel performance snapshot and derived KPIs
Recommended next experiments and human review gates
follow_up_suggestions: Review message templates with a human operator before reuse.
Log which creative variants improve group join rate, not only click-through rate.
Keep personally identifiable data out of prompt examples and dashboards.

risk_controls: Human review required before any copy is published or sent.
No sensitive personal data is stored in this demo.
No auto-publishing or auto-sending actions are enabled.
All sample data is anonymised for interview-safe discussion.
API keys are not committed to the repository.
Role-based access is recommended if this concept is rebuilt for production.
